pr_metadata.title: fix(web_ui): resurrect cross-encoder reranker, over-fetch, abstention floor, packaging integrity (Issue #37 PR-1)
pr_metadata.author: zaxbysauce
body_claims: R1: Reranker resurrection (a+b+c) — service init, proper scoring, packaged weights
R2: Over-fetch before rerank — candidateMultiplier on presets, ef_search 50→128
R3: Abstention floor — MIN_CROSS_SCORE 0.1→0.2, new DEGRADED_VECTOR_COSINE_FLOOR=0.4
P4: Validate-build integrity — SHA-256 checksums, LFS detection, Vite chunk check
P6: Missing-model UX — wllama failure is a readiness FAILURE, ModelBlockedOverlay
CI: --no-reranker flag, PackagedModelGroup 'reranker' type, PACKAGING.md docs
commit_messages: fix(web_ui): resurrect cross-encoder reranker, over-fetch, abstention floor, packaging integrity (Issue #37 PR-1)
invariant_audit: BGE query prefix on queries only (rag-orchestrator.ts:252) — untouched
L2-normalize at encode + cosine metric — untouched
Zero-chunk abstain path + image guard (rag-orchestrator.ts:439) — preserved; now reachable via R3
